code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
        is_sep = false
      end
    end
    if is_sep and has_digit
      if not done
        if total + current > 100
          done = true
        else
          total = total + current
        end
      end
      current = 0
      has_digit = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
